name: Chinese Roast Duck
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Chinese black vinegar or 2 tbsp red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the duck, removing as much fat from the neck as possible. Rinse and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Tie the neck closed.
3. Combine onions, celery, ginger, cinnamon, anise, soy sauce, sugar, and wine in a pot. Bring to a boil and pour into the duck.
4. Sew up the opening of the duck.
5. Rub the skin with salt.
6. Line a pan with heavy aluminum foil.
7. Place the duck breast side up on a rack in the pan.
8. Pour 1 cup water into the bottom of the pan to reduce smoke.
9. Roast in a 425°F oven for 30 minutes, turning once. Pour off the water and fat and prick the skin lightly with a fork.
10. Brush the duck with honey, vinegar, and soy sauce mixture.
11. Reduce the heat to 375°F and roast for an additional 1 1/2 hours or until done, turning several times and brushing with the basting mixture every half hour.
12. Snip the threads and let stand for 10 minutes.
13. Cut the duck into small pieces and serve with cilantro.
